purpose: Strict review over official-host asset/API miner results. Removes content/news/template/static noise and enforces diversity across slugs before endpoint/script inspection.

recommendation.nextLane: Run bounded endpoint/script/route inspection only for selectedInspectionTargets. Do not use the noisy miner selectedNextTargets. Do not accept rows until extraction validates exact previous_completed standings with row-count/team/arithmetic gates.
